that so what I have felt in my own business as I've developed and as the as the clinic has grown from nothing to what what's actually everything we have like six doctors and 40 staff or something all together when you put it all together so at every single stage we've had a particular limiting factor that's held us back and even now we are limited by things so there's always a limiting factor and what I thought I'd talk about would be the kind of limiting factors that you might have gone through already and will you all going through limiting factors right now there's always something limiting you but maybe just reflecting on some of the things that I've gone through that have limited my business in the last 10 years and maybe also how we got over them but just to highlight to you that there's always one thing and I'd like to I'd love you to comment on what you think the thing is now that's holding you back so that we can get a rough idea we just want to start to get our brains churning on what we could do to support people to take them to

thing to know and then you can kind of delve into how you can do this on your own terms so that you feel in fact my latest podcast covers us if you listening to if you listen to that at all and but for me that was the first thing to overcome and the next thing which I know clinicians really battle with is getting confidence in particular particularly its fear of complications so that becomes the limiting factor in your business because you are so terrified about and about a complication that you almost don't want to build your business where you don't feel safe going forward in case something happens so that might be another thing that you consider and if that's the thing holding you back fear of complications then please comment below and let me know what you think I bury getting your first treatment under your belt you might still be at the point of being limited by that often people treat people in their social network first so they're not really strangers if you've got past that hurdle the next and I always call this is like the most important hurdle in terms of business building which is how do you get your first stranger to book if you

constant trick of clients is actually a slightly different skill to how you get your first strangers booked because you need a system you need something that's actually ticking along so if you think that's a thing that's holding you back that would be useful to know and once you're at that point and you're actually developing your business and that you're getting a constant stream of clients one of the things that I noticed quite quickly is that the handling the back-office work becomes a real pain like and actually you don't want to be answering text messages at midnight and trying to prepare for your next day and ordering stock and there's a point where that becomes limiting and you start to do that when you actually you should be treating patients so and that's a crucial moment as well and if that's something you think you could do with more help with that would be nice to know as well getting a reliable stream of clients so this is different to a constant trickle this is that you can actually plan around this if you know that in six months time you're pretty sure you're gonna have 40 clients booking you're in a different realm of certainty and that's that I think is also different to be able to know that you're gonna get one or two for sure but actually being
